name: md-browse-cli
description: Command-line client for MarkdownHub (md-browse) — list, search, upload, update, version, and download markdown documents.

scripts.build:linux: pkg . --targets node20-linux-x64 --output dist/md_cli-linux-x64 && pkg . --targets node20-linux-arm64 --output dist/md_cli-linux-arm64
scripts.build:mac: pkg . --targets node20-macos-x64 --output dist/md_cli-macos-x64 && pkg . --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/md_cli-macos-arm64
scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:mac && npm run build:win
